betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Tools & Armor§f

§aCraft tools from all Thermal Foundation metals!§f

Each metal provides pickaxe, shovel, axe, hoe, and sword. §cArmor, Bows, Fishing Rods, Shears, and Shields are disabled§f in this pack.

§6Special Tools (3x3 area)§f:
§b• Hammer§f — Mining. Available in all TF metals + Iron, Gold, Diamond.
§b• Excavator§f — Digging. Available in all TF metals + Iron, Gold, Diamond.
§b• Sickle§f — Crop harvesting and leaf breaking. Available in all TF metals + Iron, Gold, Diamond.

§6Metals§f:
§bBasic§f: Copper, Tin, Silver, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel
§bAlloys§f: Platinum, Steel, Electrum, Invar, Bronze, Constantan

§6Recycling§f:
Tools can be recycled in the §bInduction Smelter§f with Sand to recover ingots (§e10%§f Slag byproduct).

§eNote§f: Vanilla materials (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond) also receive Hammer, Excavator, and Sickle variants.
